# HPD.ML.Core.ColumnCopyTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Copies a column under a new name. Useful for preserving original values before a destructive transform.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ColumnCopyTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
